ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the tool was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the tool information was last updated */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Company or individual that developed the tool */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the tool is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being evaluated */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation run */,
  "error_precision" REAL /* Precision in error detection */,
  "lexical_precision" REAL /* Precision in lexical analysis */,
  "average_precision" REAL /* Average precision across all categories */,
  "average_words_per_second" REAL /* Average number of words processed per second */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage in MB during the evaluation */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Average execution time in seconds for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation run */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the evaluation */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Description of the hardware and software environment used for the evaluation */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_runs_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the evaluation run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
